fa-person-walking-arrow-loop-left.appearanceId: walking human figure silhouette with a curved looping arrow wrapping back to the left beside or above the figure; pedestrian outline with a leftward loop-back arrow
fa-person-walking-arrow-loop-left.functionalityId: redirects or loops a walking route back to the left; represents a U-turn or return path for a pedestrian
fa-person-walking-arrow-loop-left.intentId: indicate a walking route that loops back or reverses to the left; navigate a pedestrian back along a return path

fa-person-walking-arrow-right.appearanceId: walking human figure silhouette with a straight rightward-pointing arrow beside or ahead of the figure; pedestrian outline with a forward right directional arrow
fa-person-walking-arrow-right.functionalityId: directs a walking person to continue or proceed to the right; indicates a pedestrian route heading rightward
fa-person-walking-arrow-right.intentId: guide a pedestrian to move or continue in the right direction; indicate a rightward exit or walking path

fa-person-walking-dashed-line-arrow-righ.appearanceId: walking human figure silhouette beside a dashed vertical boundary line and a rightward-pointing arrow crossing past it; pedestrian outline with a dashed divider and exit arrow
fa-person-walking-dashed-line-arrow-righ.functionalityId: represents crossing a boundary or exiting through a dashed border to the right; directs a pedestrian past a threshold or zone boundary
fa-person-walking-dashed-line-arrow-righ.intentId: indicate a pedestrian crossing a zone boundary or exiting a restricted area; guide someone through a checkpoint or border to the right

fa-person-walking-luggage.appearanceId: walking human figure silhouette pulling or carrying a rolling suitcase or luggage bag beside the figure; pedestrian outline with a wheeled travel bag
fa-person-walking-luggage.functionalityId: represents a traveler walking with luggage or a passenger in transit; indicates travel, departure, or baggage pickup
fa-person-walking-luggage.intentId: indicate a traveler departing or moving through an airport or transit area; represent baggage handling or travel check-in

fa-peseta-sign.appearanceId: a stylized currency glyph resembling two vertical strokes crossed by one or two horizontal bars, forming the Pts peseta symbol; monetary sign with double vertical strokes and crossbar
fa-peseta-sign.functionalityId: represents the Spanish peseta currency unit; displays or labels a peseta monetary amount in a financial interface
fa-peseta-sign.intentId: display or input a peseta currency value; indicate a Spanish peseta denomination in a historical or financial context

fa-peso-sign.appearanceId: a capital letter P with one or two horizontal crossbars through the upper stem, forming the peso currency symbol; peso monetary glyph with a P and horizontal bar strokes
fa-peso-sign.functionalityId: represents the Philippine or Mexican peso currency unit; displays or labels a peso monetary amount in a financial interface
fa-peso-sign.intentId: display or input a peso currency value; indicate a Latin American peso denomination in a financial or e-commerce context

fa-phone.appearanceId: a classic telephone handset silhouette with a curved receiver body, earpiece at the top, and mouthpiece at the bottom; standard phone receiver outline
fa-phone.functionalityId: initiates a phone call or opens a call interface; represents voice communication via telephone
fa-phone.intentId: make or receive a phone call; access a voice communication feature in an application

fa-phone-alt.appearanceId: a modern or stylized telephone handset silhouette with a slightly different curve or proportions than the classic receiver; alternative phone receiver outline
fa-phone-alt.functionalityId: initiates a phone call or represents an alternative phone contact option; indicates a secondary or modern voice communication channel
fa-phone-alt.intentId: make a phone call using an alternative contact method; access a secondary voice communication option

fa-phone-arrow-right.appearanceId: a telephone handset silhouette with a small rightward-pointing arrow overlaid or beside the receiver body; phone receiver outline with a forward or transfer arrow badge
fa-phone-arrow-right.functionalityId: forwards or transfers a phone call to another party; redirects an incoming call to a different number or extension
fa-phone-arrow-right.intentId: forward or transfer a phone call to another line or contact; redirect an active call in a PBX or VoIP interface

fa-phone-arrow-up.appearanceId: a telephone handset silhouette with a small upward-pointing arrow overlaid or beside the receiver body; phone receiver outline with an upward arrow badge
fa-phone-arrow-up.functionalityId: escalates or upgrades a phone call; indicates an outbound or elevated call action such as a callback or priority call
fa-phone-arrow-up.intentId: escalate a call to a higher priority or senior agent; indicate an outbound or upgraded call action

fa-phone-circle-alt.appearanceId: a filled or outlined circle containing an alternative-style telephone handset silhouette centered inside; circular badge with a stylized phone receiver
fa-phone-circle-alt.functionalityId: represents a phone call action within a circular button or avatar element; activates or displays an alternative phone contact in a round UI control
fa-phone-circle-alt.intentId: tap a circular phone button to initiate a call; access an alternative phone contact from a round interface element

fa-phone-circle-down.appearanceId: a circle outline or filled badge containing a telephone handset silhouette with a small downward-pointing arrow below or overlaid; circular phone badge with a downward arrow indicator
fa-phone-circle-down.functionalityId: represents an incoming call notification or a declining call action within a circular control; indicates a call being received or sent downward in priority
fa-phone-circle-down.intentId: indicate an incoming call or decline an active call using a circular phone button; manage inbound call routing in a phone interface

fa-phone-hangup.appearanceId: a telephone handset silhouette rotated horizontally with the receiver facing downward in a cradle-resting position; phone receiver outline in a hung-up or end-call orientation
fa-phone-hangup.functionalityId: ends or hangs up an active phone call; represents the end-call action in a voice communication interface
fa-phone-hangup.intentId: end or hang up an active phone call; access the disconnect button in a calling interface

fa-phone-incoming.appearanceId: a telephone handset silhouette with a small inward-pointing or downward-left arrow indicating an incoming direction overlaid beside the receiver; phone receiver outline with an inbound arrow badge
fa-phone-incoming.functionalityId: represents an incoming phone call notification; indicates a call being received from an external caller
fa-phone-incoming.intentId: alert to an incoming phone call; manage or accept an inbound call in a telephony interface

fa-phone-intercom.appearanceId: a rectangular intercom panel shape with a speaker grille or button layout and a small handset receiver element; intercom unit outline with speaker slots and call button
fa-phone-intercom.functionalityId: represents an intercom system for two-way communication; activates or accesses a building entry or room-to-room intercom
fa-phone-intercom.intentId: use or manage a building intercom or two-way communication panel; access a door entry or office intercom system

fa-phone-laptop.appearanceId: a telephone handset silhouette overlapping or combined with an open laptop computer outline; phone receiver paired with a laptop screen and keyboard shape
fa-phone-laptop.functionalityId: represents a softphone or VoIP application running on a laptop; connects phone call capabilities to a computer device
fa-phone-laptop.intentId: make calls or access telephony features through a laptop or desktop application; use a softphone or VoIP client on a computer

fa-phone-missed.appearanceId: a telephone handset silhouette with a diagonal slash or an X mark overlaid, indicating a missed or unanswered call; phone receiver outline with a strikethrough or cross badge
fa-phone-missed.functionalityId: represents a missed or unanswered phone call; indicates that an incoming call was not picked up
fa-phone-missed.intentId: view or respond to a missed phone call notification; track unanswered calls in a call log

fa-phone-office.appearanceId: a multi-line office telephone handset silhouette with a wider base and multiple button rows suggesting a PBX or desk phone with several line keys; office desk phone receiver outline with a multi-button panel
fa-phone-office.functionalityId: represents an office or PBX desk phone with multiple line support; manages multi-line business telephony in a corporate communication interface
fa-phone-office.intentId: manage multi-line office phone calls or a PBX system; access business desk phone features in a corporate telephony interface

fa-phone-plus.appearanceId: a telephone handset silhouette with a small plus sign overlaid or beside the receiver body; phone receiver outline with an addition or new-call badge
fa-phone-plus.functionalityId: adds a new call, contact, or phone line; initiates a conference call or creates a new phone entry
fa-phone-plus.intentId: add a new phone call or contact to a communication interface; start a conference call or create an additional phone line

fa-phone-rotary.appearanceId: a classic rotary dial telephone silhouette with a handset receiver and a circular dial face with finger holes; vintage rotary phone outline with dial plate and handset
fa-phone-rotary.functionalityId: represents a vintage rotary telephone or retro communication style; indicates a classic or legacy phone system
fa-phone-rotary.intentId: evoke a retro or vintage telephone aesthetic; indicate a classic landline or historical communication device

fa-phone-slash.appearanceId: a telephone handset silhouette with a diagonal slash line drawn through the entire receiver shape; phone receiver outline with a forward-slash strikethrough
fa-phone-slash.functionalityId: indicates that phone calls are disabled, blocked, or unavailable; mutes or blocks a phone communication channel
fa-phone-slash.intentId: disable or block phone calls in a communication interface; indicate that voice calling is currently unavailable

fa-phone-square.appearanceId: a square or rounded-square outline container with a telephone handset silhouette centered inside; square badge with a classic phone receiver inside
fa-phone-square.functionalityId: represents a phone contact or call button in a square UI element; triggers a call action from a square interface control
fa-phone-square.intentId: initiate a phone call from a square button or contact card; access phone dialing in a square-shaped UI component

fa-phone-square-alt.appearanceId: a square or rounded-square outline container with an alternative-style telephone handset silhouette centered inside; square badge with a stylized or modern phone receiver
fa-phone-square-alt.functionalityId: represents an alternative phone contact action housed in a square UI element; accesses a secondary calling option from a square control
fa-phone-square-alt.intentId: initiate an alternative phone call from a square button; access a secondary or modern phone option in a square interface element

fa-phone-square-down.appearanceId: a square or rounded-square outline container with a telephone handset silhouette and a small downward-pointing arrow badge inside; square phone badge with a downward arrow indicator
fa-phone-square-down.functionalityId: represents an incoming or declining call action within a square phone control; indicates a call being received or reduced in priority
fa-phone-square-down.intentId: manage an incoming call or decline a call from a square phone button; indicate inbound call routing in a square telephony control

fa-phone-volume.appearanceId: a telephone handset silhouette with two or three curved sound-wave arcs radiating outward from the earpiece end; phone receiver outline with speaker wave lines
fa-phone-volume.functionalityId: adjusts or indicates the speaker volume of a phone call; represents a hands-free or speakerphone mode
fa-phone-volume.intentId: adjust phone call volume or enable speakerphone mode; control audio output level during a phone call

fa-phone-xmark.appearanceId: a telephone handset silhouette with a small X mark overlaid or beside the receiver body; phone receiver outline with a close or cancel glyph badge
fa-phone-xmark.functionalityId: ends, cancels, or rejects a phone call; removes or deletes a phone contact or call entry
fa-phone-xmark.intentId: reject or end a phone call; remove a phone contact or cancel a call action in a telephony interface

fa-photo-film.appearanceId: a rectangular photograph or image frame overlapping with a strip of film reel with sprocket holes along the edges; photo print combined with a filmstrip outline
fa-photo-film.functionalityId: represents a media library containing both photos and video; accesses or manages combined photo and film content
fa-photo-film.intentId: browse or manage a mixed media library of photos and videos; access photo and film content in a media application

fa-photo-film-music.appearanceId: a rectangular photograph overlapping a filmstrip with sprocket holes and a small musical note glyph added as a badge; photo-film composite with a music note overlay
fa-photo-film-music.functionalityId: represents a multimedia library containing photos, video, and audio; accesses or manages combined photo, film, and music content
fa-photo-film-music.intentId: browse or manage a multimedia collection of photos, videos, and music; access a combined media library in an entertainment application

fa-pi.appearanceId: the Greek lowercase pi symbol with two vertical legs and a horizontal crossbar at the top; mathematical pi glyph with two downward strokes under a flat cap
fa-pi.functionalityId: represents the mathematical constant pi or a circular calculation; inserts or displays the pi symbol in a mathematical or scientific context
fa-pi.intentId: use or display the mathematical constant pi in a formula or calculation; access pi in a scientific or educational application

fa-piano.appearanceId: a grand or upright piano silhouette with a recognizable keyboard row of white keys and a raised lid or body casing; piano instrument outline showing keys and cabinet
fa-piano.functionalityId: represents a piano instrument in a music application; selects a piano sound or opens a piano-related feature
fa-piano.intentId: play or select a piano instrument in a music application; access piano-related content or sound in a musical interface

fa-piano-keyboard.appearanceId: a horizontal row of piano keys showing alternating white keys and shorter black keys in a keyboard strip; piano octave keyboard outline with white and black key layout
fa-piano-keyboard.functionalityId: represents a piano keyboard or MIDI input strip; opens a virtual keyboard or accesses musical note input
fa-piano-keyboard.intentId: play notes on a virtual piano keyboard; access a MIDI or music note input interface in a music application

fa-pickaxe.appearanceId: a pickaxe tool silhouette with a long diagonal handle and a double-headed metal head with a pointed pick end and a chisel end; mining pick outline with a handle and bifurcated metal head
fa-pickaxe.functionalityId: represents a mining, excavation, or digging tool; indicates a dig action or resource extraction in a game or construction interface
fa-pickaxe.intentId: perform a mining or excavation action; select a pickaxe tool for digging or resource gathering

fa-pickleball.appearanceId: a round perforated ball shape with small holes across its surface similar to a wiffle ball, or paired with a flat paddle outline; pickleball with hole-pattern surface or with a paddle silhouette
fa-pickleball.functionalityId: represents the sport of pickleball or its equipment; indicates a pickleball game, court, or sporting activity
fa-pickleball.intentId: access pickleball sport content or equipment selection; indicate a pickleball game or recreational activity

fa-pie.appearanceId: a round pie dish shape viewed from above or at an angle, showing a full circular crust with a crimped or fluted edge; whole pie outline with a round pastry shell
fa-pie.functionalityId: represents a baked pie food item or a recipe; indicates a food menu entry or culinary category
fa-pie.intentId: select or display a pie dish in a food or recipe application; indicate a baked dessert or savory pie in a menu

fa-pig.appearanceId: a cartoon pig silhouette with a round snout, small ears, and a curly tail; pig animal outline with distinctive round nose and ear shapes
fa-pig.functionalityId: represents a pig animal, farm setting, or piggy bank concept; indicates a farming, livestock, or savings-related feature
fa-pig.intentId: indicate a farm animal or livestock category; represent a pig in an agricultural, educational, or financial savings context

fa-piggy-bank.appearanceId: a round pig-shaped coin bank silhouette with a slot on top for inserting coins, pig ears, a snout, and a small plug or coin at the base; piggy bank outline with a coin slot and pig features
fa-piggy-bank.functionalityId: represents saving money or a savings account; indicates a financial savings goal or piggy bank deposit action
fa-piggy-bank.intentId: save money or access a savings account or fund; indicate a financial goal or personal savings feature

fa-pills.appearanceId: two oval or capsule-shaped pills overlapping or side-by-side, each with a two-tone color division along the midline; pharmaceutical capsule pair with a split-color body
fa-pills.functionalityId: represents medication, pharmaceutical dosage, or a pill reminder; indicates a medical prescription or drug intake feature
fa-pills.intentId: manage medication schedules or prescriptions; access a pharmacy or drug information feature in a health application

fa-pinata.appearanceId: a colorful star-shaped or donkey-shaped piñata silhouette with fringed paper strips hanging from a hanging rope; festive piñata outline with fringe details and a suspension string
fa-pinata.functionalityId: represents a piñata party decoration or a celebration game element; indicates a festive or birthday party activity
fa-pinata.intentId: indicate a birthday party or festive celebration event; access party planning or celebration content

fa-pinball.appearanceId: a pinball machine playfield outline or a small ball near flippers and bumpers; arcade pinball table silhouette with ball, flippers, and bumper elements
fa-pinball.functionalityId: represents a pinball arcade game; opens a pinball game or indicates an arcade entertainment feature
fa-pinball.intentId: play a pinball arcade game; access retro arcade or gaming content in an entertainment interface

fa-pineapple.appearanceId: a pineapple fruit silhouette with a segmented oval body showing a cross-hatch pattern and a crown of pointed leaf fronds at the top; tropical pineapple outline with textured body and leafy crown
fa-pineapple.functionalityId: represents a pineapple fruit or tropical food category; indicates a tropical-themed recipe, drink, or food menu item
fa-pineapple.intentId: select or display a pineapple in a food, beverage, or tropical theme context; indicate a tropical fruit in a recipe or menu application

fa-pipe.appearanceId: a single short vertical or horizontal cylindrical pipe section with open ends; plain pipe tube outline with hollow round ends
fa-pipe.functionalityId: represents a pipe segment in a plumbing or pipeline schematic; indicates a conduit, connection, or flow path element
fa-pipe.intentId: represent a pipe or conduit segment in a plumbing or infrastructure diagram; indicate a flow connection in a pipeline interface

fa-pipe-circle-check.appearanceId: a cylindrical pipe section shape with a small circle containing a checkmark badge overlaid at one end or corner; pipe tube outline with a circular check approval badge
fa-pipe-circle-check.functionalityId: marks a pipe segment as inspected, approved, or passing a check; confirms the integrity or compliance of a pipe connection
fa-pipe-circle-check.intentId: indicate that a pipe or conduit has passed inspection or meets requirements; confirm a plumbing component is approved in a maintenance interface

fa-pipe-collar.appearanceId: a cylindrical pipe section with a wider flanged collar or ring band around the middle or at one end; pipe tube outline with a raised ring or collar fitting
fa-pipe-collar.functionalityId: represents a pipe collar fitting or coupling element in a plumbing schematic; indicates a joint or reinforcement component on a pipe
fa-pipe-collar.intentId: select or identify a pipe collar or coupling fitting in a plumbing or construction diagram; represent a pipe joint or reinforcement component

fa-pipe-section.appearanceId: a short cylindrical pipe segment shown as a standalone cross-section piece with visible open-end circles; pipe cross-section tube outline with two open circular ends
fa-pipe-section.functionalityId: represents an individual pipe section in a pipeline layout; indicates a replaceable or individual pipe component in a plumbing interface
fa-pipe-section.intentId: select or identify a pipe section component in a plumbing or infrastructure diagram; indicate a replaceable pipe piece in a maintenance interface

fa-pipe-smoking.appearanceId: a classic smoking pipe silhouette with a curved stem and a round bowl at the end; curved tobacco pipe outline with bowl and mouthpiece
fa-pipe-smoking.functionalityId: represents a tobacco smoking pipe or a vintage smoking accessory; indicates a smoking, tobacco, or old-fashioned leisure context
fa-pipe-smoking.intentId: indicate a tobacco pipe or vintage smoking item; represent a smoking-related product or retro leisure activity

fa-pipe-valve.appearanceId: a pipe section outline with a valve handle or wheel overlaid at the midpoint; cylindrical pipe with a circular or T-shaped valve control handle
fa-pipe-valve.functionalityId: represents a pipe valve control for opening or closing flow; adjusts or shuts off fluid flow in a plumbing or industrial pipeline
fa-pipe-valve.intentId: control or shut off fluid flow through a pipe valve; manage a pipeline valve in a plumbing or industrial control interface

fa-pizza.appearanceId: a full round pizza viewed from above showing a circular pie with a crust edge and topping details; whole pizza disc outline with crust rim and topping patterns
fa-pizza.functionalityId: represents a full pizza pie in a food menu or ordering interface; indicates a pizza food item or category
fa-pizza.intentId: order or browse a pizza in a food delivery or restaurant menu; indicate a pizza food category in a culinary application

fa-pizza-slice.appearanceId: a single triangular pizza slice silhouette with a pointed tip, a curved crust edge at the top, and topping details on the surface; wedge-shaped pizza piece outline with crust arc and toppings
fa-pizza-slice.functionalityId: represents a single slice of pizza in a food menu or ordering interface; indicates a portion or serving of pizza
fa-pizza-slice.intentId: select or display a single pizza slice in a food ordering or restaurant application; indicate a pizza serving or portion size
